name: getFlagSelectedObjectPointer
description:
Returns whether a pointer (crosshair/marker) is drawn over the currently selected object. When enabled, a visual indicator appears around the selected celestial object to highlight it on screen.

This setting persists across Stellarium sessions and is saved in the configuration file.
returnDescription: true if the selected object pointer is visible, false otherwise

name: setFlagSelectedObjectPointer
description:
Sets whether a pointer (crosshair/marker) is drawn over the currently selected object. This controls the visibility of the visual selection indicator that highlights the selected celestial object on screen.

When enabled, a crosshair or circle marker appears around the selected object. This is useful for presentations, tutorials, or when you need to clearly identify which object is currently selected.

This setting persists across Stellarium sessions and is saved in the configuration file.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to show the selection pointer, false to hide it

name: addToExtraInfoString
description:
Appends additional text to the information panel for the currently selected object. This is useful for plugins or scripts that want to display custom information (debug data, astronomical calculations, cultural notes, etc.) without modifying Stellarium's core code. **Important - InfoStringGroup Flags (use these numeric values):** | Flag | Value | Description | |------|-------|-------------| | Name | 1 | Object name | | CatalogNumber | 2 | Catalog numbers | | Magnitude | 4 | Magnitude data | | RaDecJ2000 | 8 | J2000 equatorial position | | RaDecOfDate | 16 | Equatorial position of date | | AltAzi | 32 | Altitude/Azimuth position | | Distance | 64 | Distance information | | Elongation | 128 | Elongation, phase angle | | Size | 256 | Angular size | | Velocity | 512 | Velocity information | | ProperMotion | 1024 | Annual proper motion | | Extra | 2048 | General extra fields | | HourAngle | 4096 | Hour angle + Declination | | AbsoluteMagnitude | 8192 | Absolute magnitude | | GalacticCoord | 16384 | Galactic coordinates | | SupergalacticCoord | 32768 | Supergalactic coordinates | | OtherCoord | 65536 | Additional coordinates | | ObjectType | 131072 | Type of object | | EclipticCoordJ2000 | 262144 | Ecliptic J2000 position | | EclipticCoordOfDate | 524288 | Ecliptic position of date | | IAUConstellation | 1048576 | IAU constellation code | | CulturalConstellation | 2097152 | Culture-specific constellation | | SiderealTime | 4194304 | Sidereal time | | RTSTime | 8388608 | Rise/Transit/Set times | | SolarLunarPosition | 16777216 | Sun/Moon horizontal positions | | **Script** | **33554432** | **For script-generated info** | | **DebugAid** | **67108864** | **For debugging information** | | NoFont | 134217728 | Disable font formatting | | PlainText | 268435456 | Strip HTML tags | **Common flag combinations:** - Script + DebugAid = 100663296 - Name + Magnitude = 5 - Extra + Script = 33556480 **Note:** The text supports HTML formatting. Use `
` for line breaks.

parameters.name: flags
parameters.description: InfoStringGroup flag(s) determining where the text appears

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The text to append (supports HTML formatting and line breaks)

name: setExtraInfoString
description:
Replaces (overwrites) any existing extra information text for the specified flag group. Unlike addToExtraInfoString() which appends, this function replaces all existing text for the given flags.

If an empty string is provided, it removes all text for the specified flag group.

**Important flag values:**
- Script = 33554432 (for script-generated info)
- DebugAid = 67108864 (for debugging information)
- Extra = 2048 (for general extra fields)

See addToExtraInfoString() for complete list of flag values.

parameters.name: flags
parameters.description: InfoStringGroup flag(s) determining where the text appears

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The text to set (supports HTML formatting). Use empty string to clear.

name: removeExtraInfoStrings
description:
Removes all extra information strings that match the specified flag group(s). This is useful for cleaning up temporary debug messages or script output when they are no longer needed.

**Important flag values:**
- Script = 33554432 (for script-generated info)
- DebugAid = 67108864 (for debugging information)
- Extra = 2048 (for general extra fields)

You can combine multiple flags using the | operator to remove from multiple categories at once.

See addToExtraInfoString() for complete list of flag values.

parameters.name: flags
parameters.description: InfoStringGroup flag(s) indicating which messages to remove
